info.title: Usertour API v2
info.description: Project-scoped v2 API — personal API token (utp_) authentication.

codeName.description: Stable identifier, unique per project. Immutable.

scope.description: Which object the attribute belongs to: user, company, or companyMembership.

codeName.description: Stable identifier, unique per project + scope. Immutable.

type.description: Content kind: flow, checklist, launcher, banner, survey.

name.description: Name for the copy (defaults to the source name).

environmentId.description: Target environment (defaults to the source content’s environment).

versionId.description: The version to publish as this environment’s live version.

contentId.description: The content to fork a new draft version of.

themeId.description: Theme to apply, or null to clear.

attributes.description: Custom attributes to set on the user (merged into existing attributes).
Custom attributes to set on the company (merged into existing attributes).
Custom attributes to set on the membership (e.g. the user's role in the company).

isDefault.description: Make this the project default theme.

settings.description: Replaces the theme settings when provided.

bizType.description: What the segment groups: user or company. Immutable.
